description: Three files named format-event.ts live in three sibling sub-directories (shipping-handlers, billing-handlers, audit-handlers). The shipping-handlers variant wraps JSON.stringify in try/catch; the other two propagate exceptions. Directory-only sibling search would miss this — they live in different dirs.

findings.rationale: shipping-handlers/format-event.ts wraps JSON.stringify in try/catch while its cross-directory twins (billing-handlers, audit-handlers) propagate exceptions. The try/catch is load-bearing: shipping has a no-exceptions contract with its downstream queue. Cross-file twin detection surfaces this divergence; directory-only search would miss it.
